mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the Houst index signals a strong demand for goods, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strong demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate signals a strengthening labor market, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening labor markets are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the industrial production index signals a weakening supply chain, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening supply chains are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the GDP growth rate signals a slowing demand cycle, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in slowing demand periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening monetary periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening labor markets are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the Houst index signals a strong demand for goods, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strong demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the industrial production index signals a strengthening supply chain, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening supply chains are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
